text.title: SEO for SPAs Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply SEO for SPAs end-to-end. Each step lists input, action, output, and an optional decision gate.

step.name: classify-routes
step.action: Pick SSG / SSR / ISR / CSR per route; document.

step.name: metadata-per-route
step.action: Wire per-route metadata API; declare canonical + OG.

step.name: structured-data
step.action: Emit JSON-LD per template; validate via Schema.org / rich-results test.

step.name: sitemap-and-hreflang
step.action: Auto-generate sitemap; emit hreflang per locale + x-default.

step.name: cwv-targets
step.action: Declare LCP/INP/CLS targets; wire Lighthouse CI.
